settings.brand_story: Bizarre Tropicals is a South African carnivorous plant nursery run by Jaco Van Den Berg. From tissue-cultured sundews to show-stopping Nepenthes, we grow and ship living specimens for collectors across the country.
settings.newsletter_text: Seasonal drops, care notes, and new stock alerts — no spam.
settings.currency_note: All prices in South African Rand (ZAR · R)
